Name: 汲水地基
ZHCN: 汲水地基
ENUS: Draw Water Foundation

Name: I汲水地基
ZHCN:
在水世界建造的地基为半浮岛型地基，这层人造地面底下设有大型抽水器，并留有接口为建造在其上的建筑接入供水。
<color="#FD965ECC">所有需要水的生产建筑水自动填满</color>
ENUS:
The foundation built in the Water World is a semi floating island foundation, which is equipped with large water pumps under the artificial ground and has interfaces for connecting water supply to the buildings built on it.
<color="#FD965ECC">All production buildings that require water are automatically filled with water</color>

Name: 自然降温
ZHCN: 自然降温
ENUS: Natural Cooling

Name: I自然降温
ZHCN:
在表面寒风呼啸的星球，伺服器可以利用自然寒风为处理器冷却降温，以节省冷却系统的功耗。
<color="#FD965ECC">伺服器需要的能耗-50%</color>
ENUS:
On a planet with howling cold winds on its surface, servers can utilize natural cold winds to cool processors and save power on the cooling system.
<color="#FD965ECC">The energy consumption required by the server is -50%</color>

Name: 母星特质
ZHCN: 母星特质
ENUS: Mother Planet Characteristics

Name: I母星特质
ZHCN:
接下来，砍树很有用。
<color="#FD965ECC">可以从树木采集种子和本土菌种</color>

<color="#FD965ECC">特别标注：激光砍树【LaserClearing】MOD对此无效</color>
ENUS:
Next, cutting down trees is very useful.
<color="#FD965ECC">Seeds and native bacterial strains can be collected from trees</color>

<color="#FD965ECC">Special note: The LaserClearing MOD is not effective for this</color>

Name: 信息素
ZHCN: 信息素
ENUS: Thermal Fuel Recycling

Name: I信息素
ZHCN:
当地植物在花期分泌的某种信息素，对于生命的繁育有促进作用。
<color="#FD965ECC">生态温室执行配方自动增产</color>
ENUS:
A certain pheromone secreted by local plants during flowering promotes the reproduction of life.
<color="#FD965ECC">ecological greenhouses executes formula to automatically increase production</color>

Name: 真空冶炼
ZHCN: 真空冶炼
ENUS: Vacuum Smelting

Name: I真空冶炼
ZHCN:
在无大气的星球表面，仅需简单的封闭就可以让熔炼反应在真空下进行，没有空气的氧气以及其他杂质干扰，可以轻易产出高品质的金属。
<color="#FD965ECC">熔炉产物抓出时自带3级增产</color>
ENUS:
On the surface of a planet without an atmosphere, melting reactions can be carried out under vacuum with simple sealing, without the interference of air, oxygen, and other impurities, making it easy to produce high-quality metals.
<color="#FD965ECC">The furnace product comes with a three-level increase in production</color>

Name: 拥有隐藏
ZHCN: 拥有隐藏
ENUS: Having Hidden

Name: I拥有隐藏
ZHCN:
该星球拥有隐藏。
<color="#FD965ECC">手动砍树或挖石头有概率掉落隐藏以解锁隐藏科技</color>
ENUS:
This planet has hidden features.
<color="#FD965ECC">Manually cutting down trees or digging stones has a chance of falling and hiding to unlock hidden technology</color>

Name: 热聚增效
ZHCN: 热聚增效
ENUS: Artificial Star Efficiency

Name: I热聚增效
ZHCN:
通过改善磁场设计、增加磁场强度、研发新的等离子体稳定技术，减少等离子体的湍动和逃逸，从而提高能量密度和维持时间。
<color="#FD965ECC">聚变发电效率 +10%</color>
ENUS:
By improving the magnetic field design, increasing the magnetic field strength, and developing new plasma stabilization techniques, the turbulence and escape of the plasma can be reduced, thereby enhancing the energy density and confinement time.
<color="#FD965ECC">Artificial Star Efficiency +10%</color>

Name: 资源采掘
ZHCN: 资源采掘
ENUS: Unlimited Resource Mining

Name: I资源采掘
ZHCN:
通过自动化控制系统高效回收资源，如尾矿再利用、废水处理和循环利用，减少资源浪费，提高资源利用率。
<color="#FD965ECC">矿物采集速度 +25%</color>
ENUS:
By using automated control systems to efficiently recycle resources, such as tailings reuse, wastewater treatment, and recycling, resource waste can be reduced and resource utilization rates can be improved.
<color="#FD965ECC">Mining Speed +25%</color>

Name: 裂变增效
ZHCN: 裂变增效
ENUS: Fission Efficiency

Name: I裂变增效
ZHCN:
通过燃料再处理技术，回收未完全反应的铀和钚，减少核废料的产生，提高燃料利用率。
<color="#FD965ECC">裂变发电效率 +20%</color>
ENUS:
By using fuel reprocessing technology, unreacted uranium and plutonium can be recovered, reducing the production of nuclear waste and improving fuel utilization.
<color="#FD965ECC">Fission Efficiency +20%</color>

Name: 先进推进
ZHCN: 先进推进
ENUS: Advanced Propulsion

Name: I先进推进
ZHCN:
使用空气动力学优化、发动机升级、先进自动驾驶算法等多种方法，实现更精确的飞行控制，提高运输机的速度和整体性能。
<color="#FD965ECC">配送物流速度 +25%</color>
ENUS:
By using methods such as aerodynamic optimization, engine upgrades, and advanced autopilot algorithms, more precise flight control can be achieved, improving the speed and overall performance of the transport aircraft.
<color="#FD965ECC">Drone Speed +25%</color>

Name: 特征向量模拟
ZHCN: 特征向量模拟
ENUS: Eigenvector Simulation

Name: I特征向量模拟
ZHCN:
根据机械能量计划的相关信息，模拟信号。降低由于电力因素导致的地面黑雾巢穴威胁度增长。
<color="#FD965ECC">电力威胁增长 -20%</color>
ENUS:
Analog signals based on information about the Mechanical Energy Program. Reduce the increase in threat level of dark fog ground nests due to factory power factors.
<color="#FD965ECC">Power related threat growth -20%</color>

Name: 中继信号干扰
ZHCN: 中继信号干扰
ENUS: Relay Signal Interference

Name: I中继信号干扰
ZHCN:
干扰中继站与太空黑雾巢穴间的信号链路。降低由于地面战斗因素导致的太空黑雾巢穴威胁度增长。
<color="#FD965ECC">太空威胁增长 -20%</color>
ENUS:
Interferes with signaling links between relay stations and black fog nests in space. Reduce the increase in the threat level of dark fog space nests due to ground combats.
<color="#FD965ECC">Space threat growth -20%</color>

Name: 神经元重编程
ZHCN: 神经元重编程
ENUS: Neuronal Reprogramming

Name: I神经元重编程
ZHCN:
利用现有黑雾残骸，重编程神经元后可干扰黑雾系统的运转模式。降低地面黑雾巢穴部队建造速度。
<color="#FD965ECC">部队建造速度 -20%</color>
ENUS:
Utilizes existing Black Mist debris, reprogramming neurons can interfere with the Black Mist system's mode of operation. Reduce the units replicate speed of dark fog ground nests.
<color="#FD965ECC">Unit replicate Speed -20%</color>

Name: 异常代码分析
ZHCN: 异常代码分析
ENUS: Abnormal Code Analysis

Name: I异常代码分析
ZHCN:
逆向分析残骸中的黑雾代码，并尝试利用机械能量计划的相关数据链路。降低地面黑雾巢穴基地扩张速度。
<color="#FD965ECC">基地扩张速度 -20%</color>
ENUS:
Reverse analyze the Black Mist code in the wreckage and attempt to utilize the data link associated with the Mechanical Energy Program. Reduce the build speed of dark fog ground nests.
<color="#FD965ECC">Base build Speed -20%</color>

Name: 海洋丛林介绍
ZHCN:
海洋丛林星球上有60%-70%的地表被淡水海洋所覆盖，丰沛的水资源在大陆上孕育出繁茂的雨林。
　　这里的赤道附近往往有连绵不绝的降雨，而纬度更低的地方则随着星球公转有鲜明的雨季和旱季之分。
　　海洋丛林星球上保有巨大的生物量，是个巨大的生物宝库，极端繁荣的生态圈逼迫着生物向更强更高效的能量吸收，能量利用效率进化，在这里，或许能找到比记录在资料库中更加强大的菌种。
ENUS:
60% -70% of the surface of the Ocean Jungle planet is covered by freshwater oceans, and abundant water resources have nurtured lush rainforests on the continent. 
Near the equator here, there is often continuous rainfall, while at lower latitudes, there are distinct rainy and dry seasons as the planet orbits. 
The ocean jungle planet has a huge biomass and is a huge treasure trove of life. The extremely prosperous ecosystem forces organisms to evolve towards stronger and more efficient energy absorption and utilization efficiency. Here, perhaps more powerful bacterial strains can be found than those recorded in databases.

Name: 潘多拉沼泽介绍
ZHCN:
潘多拉沼泽星球的地表上几乎不存在游离的水域，全部被密密麻麻的丛林和菌毯所覆盖，这里相当湿润，这些生物近乎“主动地”影响到整颗星球的气候。我们甚至发现有些森林能够通过调整叶片角度来控制季风的方向。
　　潘多拉沼泽星球上的植物选择了一种非常高效的光合作用途径，能将星球接受的恒星辐射中65%的能量用于合成苹果酸。研究指出，假如将这颗星球上的生物圈视作一个文明的话，那“它们”对物质的利用已经达到0.79级文明的程度。极端发达的生态圈逼迫着生物向更强更高效的能量吸收，能量利用效率进化，在这里，或许能找到比记录在资料库中更加强大的菌种。
ENUS:
There are almost no free water bodies on the surface of Pandora's Swamp planet, covered entirely by dense forests and microbial mats. It is quite humid here, and these organisms almost "actively" affect the climate of the entire planet. We even found that some forests can control the direction of the monsoon by adjusting the angle of their leaves.
 The plants on Pandora's Swamp planet have chosen a highly efficient pathway of photosynthesis, which can use 65% of the energy received by the planet from stellar radiation to synthesize malic acid. Research has shown that if the biosphere on this planet is considered a civilization, their utilization of matter has reached a level of 0.79 civilization. The extremely developed ecosystem forces organisms to absorb stronger and more efficient energy, and the efficiency of energy utilization evolves. Here, perhaps more powerful bacterial strains can be found than those recorded in databases.

Name: 熔岩介绍
ZHCN:
一颗炙热的、被融化了的星球，它躁动不安的内在带来极端活跃的地质运动。它常年喷发的火山群带来奔涌不息的岩浆流和遮天蔽日的烟雾。它的表面与其说是大陆，不如说是在熔岩中泛起的沉渣。
　　所有行星在演化的早期阶段都会经过这一历程，随着星球内部的放射性物质衰变结束和地幔的冷却，它们会逐渐出现稳定的地壳。
　　如果星球过分地靠近恒星的话，它们也会在被恒星吞噬前保持熔融状态。
　　奔涌的岩浆溶解着来自地幔深处的物质，裸露而稳定的岩浆流不仅能熔炼为金属，也为获取地热能源带来方便。这些独有的特征使得熔岩星球比较容易受到青睐而得到高效地开发。
ENUS:
A hot, melted planet, its restless interior brings extremely active geological movements. The volcanic group that erupts year-round brings surging magma flows and smoke that covers the sky and sun. Its surface is more like sediment rising in lava than a continent.
All planets undergo this process in the early stages of evolution, as the radioactive material inside the planet decays and the mantle cools, they gradually develop stable crust.
If planets get too close to their stars, they will also remain in a molten state before being engulfed by the stars.
The surging magma dissolves materials from deep within the mantle, and the exposed and stable magma flow not only melts into metals, but also brings convenience to obtaining geothermal energy. These unique features make lava planets more easily favored and efficiently developed.

Name: 戈壁介绍
ZHCN:
因为至今仍在活跃的火山运动，戈壁星球拥有极端稠密的二氧化碳大气层，失控的温室效应导致极高的地表温度，昼夜温差极小，接近地表的地方风速也不高，这使得它得以保留下部分从远古遗留下的地质特征。
　　活跃的火山运动也证明了这颗星球的内核依旧火热，可以开采富含稀有金属的深层熔岩，发展为高端金属产品生产基地。
ENUS:
Due to the still active volcanic activity, the Gobi planet has an extremely dense carbon dioxide atmosphere. The uncontrolled greenhouse effect leads to extremely high surface temperatures, with minimal temperature differences between day and night, and low wind speeds near the surface. This allows it to preserve some geological features left over from ancient times. 
The active volcanic activity also proves that the core of this planet is still hot, which can extract deep magma rich in rare metals and develop into a production base for high-end metal products.

Name: 冰原冻土介绍
ZHCN:
一颗主要由冰和岩石组成的星球。富含甲烷，由于其表面零下一百七十多度的低温，甲烷变得如地球的水一般，会循环气化与冷凝，形成天气，与大片的甲烷湖泊。
　　这类星球的生态系统由于缺乏恒星的辐照，通常不会有太大的体量。但是，当它作为某颗气巨星的卫星时，存在生命的冰原冻土星球很可能会演化出某种长达数公里的海藻，并通过切割气巨星的磁场获得能量，摄入氢气，排出甲烷，从而作为第一营养级支撑起一个繁盛的地下生态系统。
ENUS:
A planet primarily composed of ice and rocks. Rich in methane, due to its surface temperature of over minus 170 degrees Celsius, methane becomes like water on Earth and undergoes cyclic gasification and condensation, forming weather and large methane lakes. 
The ecosystems of such planets usually do not have a large size due to the lack of stellar radiation. However, when it serves as a satellite of a gas giant, the ice and permafrost planet where life exists is likely to evolve some kind of seaweed that can grow for several kilometers, and obtain energy by cutting the magnetic field of the gas giant, ingesting hydrogen gas and excreting methane, thus supporting a thriving underground ecosystem as the first trophic level.

Name: 黑海岩滩
ZHCN: 黑海岩滩
ENUS: Black Sea Beach

Name: 黑石岩滩介绍
ZHCN:
黑海盐滩星球上拥有以氮气为主要成分的大气层，地表上覆盖着细腻的沙砾和盐花。
　　或许曾经有过繁荣的生态圈，甚至是繁盛的生化文明，不过一切都如过往烟云，只有地表上零星存在的油海作为它昔日辉煌的证明。很难相信一个生态圈如何在短时间内自然地大量分解为烷烃，堆积成海。或许，挖开地表上的碎石，能找到些许蛛丝马迹。
ENUS:
The Black Sea Salt Flats planet has an atmosphere mainly composed of nitrogen gas, and the surface is covered with fine gravel and salt flowers. 
Perhaps there was once a thriving ecosystem, even a thriving biochemical civilization, but everything remains as fleeting as the past, with only sporadic oil seas on the surface as evidence of its former glory. It's hard to believe how an ecosystem can naturally break down into large amounts of hydrocarbons and accumulate into oceans in a short period of time. Perhaps by digging up the gravel on the surface, some clues can be found.

Name: 飓风石林介绍
ZHCN:
飓风石林星球的地表上散布着诸多乔木留下的化石，拥有一个主要成分为氯气的稀薄大气。
　　学界普遍认为这颗星球曾经拥有一个非常繁盛的生态系统，直到某种藻类进化出代谢氯气的能力。浓度逐渐上升的氯气毒杀了整个生物圈，包括制造氯气的始作俑者。
　　地表被常年累月的风蚀变得平坦，没有地形的遮挡，风速变得越来越快。
ENUS:
The surface of Hurricane Stone Forest is scattered with fossils left by many trees, and it has a thin atmosphere mainly composed of chlorine gas.
The academic community generally believes that this planet once had a very prosperous ecosystem, until a certain type of algae evolved the ability to metabolize chlorine gas. The gradually increasing concentration of chlorine gas poisoned the entire biosphere, including the creators of chlorine gas production.
The surface has become flat due to years of wind erosion, without the obstruction of terrain, and the wind speed is getting faster and faster.

Name: 干旱荒漠介绍
ZHCN:
干旱荒漠星球的地表被漫无边际的沙漠所覆盖，主要成分为二氧化碳的大气中弥散着无数细小砂砾。由于地表昼夜温差大，这类星球上常有大风，终年盛行的风带在星球上留下深浅不一的环状条纹。
　　干旱荒漠星球上曾经也有过山脉，但在造山运动停止后这些耸立的山峰便逐渐被风化消磨，星球日渐平坦，最终只留下嶙峋的怪石散布在沙漠上。
　　观测站曾探测到厚厚沙层下有金属反应，可能在沙层下埋藏着遗迹，或许，我们应该挖挖看？
ENUS:
The surface of arid desert planets is covered by endless deserts, with countless small gravel particles dispersed in the atmosphere mainly composed of carbon dioxide. Due to the large temperature difference between day and night on the surface, there are often strong winds on these planets, and the prevailing wind belts leave varying depths of circular stripes on the planet throughout the year.
There used to be mountains on arid desert planets, but after the mountain building movement stopped, these towering peaks were gradually eroded by weathering, and the planet became increasingly flat, leaving only rugged rocks scattered on the desert.
The observation station has detected metal reactions beneath a thick layer of sand, suggesting that there may be relics buried beneath the sand layer. Perhaps we should dig and see?

Name: 里程碑名称29
ZHCN: 里程碑：裂变发电
ENUS: Milestone: Fission Energy

ZHCN: 你激活了第一座裂变能源发电站。多种技术的综合应用，使一体化快中子反应堆产生大量的清洁电力。

ENUS: You activated your first Fission Power Station. The new generation of integrated fast reactors uses multiple technologies to generate large amounts of clean electricity.

ZHCN: 达成条件：激活一座裂变能源发电站

ZHCN: 你激活了第一座人造恒星，它优雅地转动着，犹如太阳般炽烈地燃烧着，稳定地将聚变原料所蕴藏的巨大能量输出到电网。

Name: 机甲功率提升
ZHCN: 发电功率提升
ENUS: Power Generation Boost

Name: 星环介绍标题
ZHCN: 星环MOD简介
ENUS: Orbital Ring MOD Introduction

Name: 星环介绍前字
ZHCN:
星球调整：
    重设矿物，删除非有机星的煤，新增黄铁矿、辉银矿、地下水、深层熔岩四种矿物；
    新增岩浆海洋、甲烷海洋、原油海洋；
    星球特质，提示该星球的特殊加成/是否有隐藏。

产线调整：
    大面积配方重做；
    对自动化生产属性进行提升，如供电范围、传送带、分拣器速度、制造台速度等；
    燃料电池发电厂仅能在含氧大气环境下运行（燃料棒除外）；添加裂变电站、同位素温差发电机；
    星环建筑：建筑在同步轨道的大型太空设施；
    太空船坞，轨道熔炼站，物流港，星环对撞机等。

科技调整：
    添加多种复合矩阵及对应科研需求；

武器调整：
    生产贫铀弹头、核导弹；

其他调整：
    机甲燃料仓只能使用燃料棒或电池进行供电；
ENUS: To be translated

Name: 巨型建筑介绍标题
ZHCN: 巨型建筑介绍
ENUS: Mega Buildings Introduction

Name: 巨型建筑介绍前字
ZHCN:
巨型建筑是一类具有高集成度的生产设施。虽然它们看起来与物流站很相似，但并不能装载物流运输机。

一个巨型建筑可将原料或产物通过传送带输出到下一个巨型建筑，从而高效利用占地。
ENUS:
Mega buildings are a class of production facilities with a high degree of integration. Although they look similar to a logistics station, they do not carry a logistics transporter. 

One mega building can export raw materials or products to the next mega building via a conveyor belt, thus making efficient use of space.

Name: 行星特质介绍标题
ZHCN: 行星特质
ENUS: Planetary Characteristics

Name: 行星特质介绍前字
ZHCN: 一个行星可能会拥有某种全球性的加成特质或隐藏，可在行星视图中（默认快捷键为M键）点击行星特质打开查看。
ENUS: A planet may possess certain global bonus traits or hidden features, which can be accessed by clicking on the planet traits in the planet view (default shortcut key is M).

Name: 物质分解设施介绍标题
ZHCN: 物质分解设施
ENUS: Recycling Factory Introduction

Name: 物质分解设施介绍前字
ZHCN:
在选择<color="#FD965ECC">物质回收</color>配方后，物质分解设施可将输入到其中的所有物品按数量比例转换为沙土，并在达到一定数量后静默返还到机甲背包中。
若背包未满，输入的建筑物品可返还75%的制造原料到背包中。
ENUS:
After selecting <color="#FD965ECC">Matter recovery</color> recipe, the Recycling Factory converts all items entered into it into Sand in proportion to their quantity, and silently returns them to package after a certain amount has been reached.
Incoming construction items return 75% of their own manufacturing materials to the package (if the package is not full).

Name: 制造类型调整介绍标题
ZHCN: 制造类型调整
ENUS: Manufacturing Type Adjustment

Name: 制造类型调整介绍前字
ZHCN: 经过特化调整的制造台可以满足不同制造精度的需求，但除黑雾制造台外，不同制造台不能通用。
ENUS: After specialization, the assemblers can meet the needs of different precision, but except for the dark fog assembler, different assembler can not be used universally.

Name: 离星燃料消耗描述
ZHCN: 为了突破行星的重力井，离开星球需要额外消耗背包中的化学燃料棒，消耗的数量会随着背包和手上的物品数量增加而增长，具体为每格物品数量除以物品最大堆叠的总和乘以10。在卫星上离开星球消耗的化学燃料棒减免90%
ENUS: In order to break through the planet's gravity well, leaving the planet requires additional consumption of chemical fuel rods in the backpack. The amount consumed will increase as the number of items in the backpack and hands increases, Specifically, it is calculated by dividing the number of items in each slot by the total maximum stack size of the items, and then multiplying the result by 10. 90% reduction in chemical fuel rods consumed when leaving the planet on the satellite

Name: 离星燃料消耗减少描述
ZHCN: 推进器技术的进步带来燃料利用率的提升，离开星球额外消耗背包中的化学燃料棒减少50%
ENUS: The advancement of propulsion technology has brought about an improvement in fuel utilization efficiency, reducing the additional consumption of chemical fuel rods in backpacks by 50% when leaving the planet

Name: 离星燃料消耗取消描述
ZHCN: 离开星球不再需要额外消耗背包中的化学燃料棒
ENUS: Leaving the planet no longer requires additional consumption of chemical fuel rods in the backpack

Name: 背包化学燃料棒不足，需要
ZHCN: 背包化学燃料棒不足，需要
ENUS: Insufficient chemical fuel rods in backpack,

ZHCN: 钛矿
ENUS: Titanium ore

Name: 莫桑石矿脉
ZHCN: 莫桑石矿脉
ENUS: Moissanite vein

Name: 铀矿脉
ZHCN: 铀矿脉
ENUS: Uranium Veins

Name: 辉银矿脉
ZHCN: 辉银矿脉
ENUS: Silver ore vein

Name: 黄铁矿脉
ZHCN: 黄铁矿脉
ENUS: Huangtie Veins

Name: 电路控制元件
ZHCN: 电路控制元件
ENUS: Circuit Control Components

Name: I电路控制元件
ZHCN: 门电路，将输入的电信号按照与或非逻辑处理后输出，单个门电路是最简单的单元电路，也是一步步构建电路板，集成电路的基石。
ENUS: A gate circuit processes input electrical signals into AND or NOR logic and outputs them. A single gate circuit is the simplest unit circuit and the cornerstone of building circuit boards and integrated circuits step by step.

Name: 真空电子管
ZHCN: 真空电子管
ENUS: Vacuum Tube

Name: R真空电子管
ZHCN: 第一代电信号逻辑处理电子元件，通过在真空的玻璃管里加热金属板使阴极发射电子，再由栅极控制电子流量，组成最简单的真空电子管。
ENUS: The first generation of electrical signal logic processing electronic components consisted of heating a metal plate in a vacuum glass tube to cause the cathode to emit electrons, and then controlling the electron flow through a gate to form the simplest vacuum electronic tube.

Name: 半导体晶体管
ZHCN: 半导体晶体管
ENUS: Semiconductor Transistor

Name: T半导体晶体管
ZHCN: 使用半导体硅制造晶体管，在可靠性，体积，能耗上都完全超越了老旧的真空电子管。
ENUS: Using semiconductor silicon to manufacture transistors completely surpasses old vacuum tubes in terms of reliability, volume, and energy consumption.

Name: R半导体晶体管
ZHCN: 使用半导体硅制成二极管三极管场效应管，统称为晶体管，与电子管相比不需要真空气密，不需要加热预热，耐冲击，体积小，电子管是电气时代的敲门砖，而晶体管才是支撑起大规模集成电路的中流砥柱。
ENUS: The use of semiconductor silicon to make diode transistor field-effect transistors, collectively known as transistors, does not require vacuum sealing, heating and preheating, is shock resistant, and has a small size compared to electronic tubes. Electronic tubes are the stepping stone to the electrical age, while transistors are the backbone that supports large-scale integrated circuits.

Name: T纳米晶体管
ZHCN: 从文明遗物中拼凑整理出来的科技，纳米晶体管是尺寸在纳米量级的晶体管，直径可缩小至1-2纳米。其体积仅为传统硅晶体管的百万分之一。
ENUS: The technology pieced together and organized from cultural relics, the nanotransistor is a transistor with a size in the nanometer range, and its diameter can be reduced to 1-2 nanometers. Its volume is only one millionth of that of traditional silicon transistors.

Name: 纳米晶体管
ZHCN: 纳米晶体管
ENUS: Nano Transistor

Name: R纳米晶体管
ZHCN: 使用碳纳米管制造的尺寸在纳米量级的晶体管，其体积仅为传统硅晶体管的百万分之一，这是不突破粒子论能做到的极限。
ENUS: The size of transistors made using carbon nanotubes in the nanometer range is only one millionth of that of traditional silicon transistors, which is the limit that particle theory can achieve without breaking through.

Name: 银浆印刷电路
ZHCN: 银浆印刷电路
ENUS: Silver Paste Printed Circuit

Name: R银浆印刷电路
ZHCN: 利用银导电性能更优异的特性，将导电银浆印刷在基材上形成电路，制成更高性能的电路板。
ENUS: By utilizing the superior conductivity of silver, conductive silver paste is printed onto a substrate to form circuits, resulting in higher performance circuit boards.

Name: 超高效过滤器
ZHCN: 超高效过滤器
ENUS: Ultra Low Penetration Air Filter

Name: I超高效过滤器
ZHCN: 超高效过滤器ULPA，用于维持加工环境达到ISO 1级洁净度，即每立方米空气中大于等于0.1微米的颗粒物不超过10颗，使用超细玻璃纤维作为核心滤材，常用于芯片等高精度加工环境。
ENUS: Ultra Low Penetration Air Filter is used to maintain the processing environment to achieve ISO Class 1 cleanliness, which means that there are no more than 10 particles greater than or equal to 0.1 microns per cubic meter of air. It uses ultra-fine glass fiber as the core filter material and is commonly used in high-precision processing environments such as chips.

Name: 芯片
ZHCN: 芯片
ENUS: Chip

Name: I芯片
ZHCN: 超大规模集成电路的载体，使用纯净半导体制造成易碎的薄片，即晶圆后，在上面不断地光刻，离子注入和沉积，加工出“城市”般的立体纳米结构，最终封装成一枚小小的芯片。
ENUS: The carrier of ultra large scale integrated circuits is made of pure semiconductors into fragile thin sheets, namely wafers, which are continuously photolithography, ion implantation, and deposition on top to process "city like" three-dimensional nanostructures, and finally packaged into a small chip.

Name: 纳米晶体管处理器
ZHCN: 纳米晶体管处理器
ENUS: Nano Transistor Processor

Name: R纳米晶体管处理器
ZHCN: 将纳米晶体管技术用于芯片的制造，可以在同样的面积下集成更多的晶体管，从而制造出性能更强的芯片。
ENUS: Applying nanotransistor technology to chip manufacturing can integrate more transistors in the same area, thereby producing chips with stronger performance.

Name: T第四代半导体
ZHCN: 第四代半导体
ENUS: Fourth generation semiconductor

Name: T第四代半导体描述
ZHCN: 得益于粒子打印技术的发展，我们终于得以大规模打印出完美晶体的金刚石，即晶圆级金刚石，这也意味着，第四代半导体，金刚石晶圆的量产已不再有门槛。
ENUS: Thanks to the development of particle printing technology, we have finally been able to print perfect crystal diamonds on a large scale, namely wafer level diamonds. This also means that there is no longer a barrier to mass production for fourth generation semiconductors, diamond wafers.

Name: 芯片（四代半导体）
ZHCN: 芯片（四代半导体）
ENUS: Chip (Fourth Generation Semiconductor)

Name: R芯片（四代半导体）
ZHCN: 将工业级金刚石用粒子打印重整修补为晶圆级金刚石，并与铜粒子一起在其上打印出超大规模集成电路。
ENUS: Transforming industrial grade diamond into wafer level diamond through particle printing and repairing, and printing ultra large scale integrated circuits on it together with copper particles.

Name: 主板
ZHCN: 主板
ENUS: Motherboard

Name: I主板
ZHCN: 将晶圆切割封装为处理器后，接入电路板，组成电子计算机主控板，在处理数据以及对处理过程进行控制更加出色。
ENUS: After cutting and packaging the wafer into a processor, it is connected to a circuit board to form an electronic computer main control board, which performs better in processing data and controlling the processing process.

Name: 多板架构
ZHCN: 多板架构
ENUS: Multi Board Architecture

Name: T多板架构
ZHCN: 主备板架构是一种计算高可用方案,主要用于确保系统在主板发生故障时,备份板可以无缝接管,从而提高系统的可靠性和可用性的架构。
ENUS: The primary backup board architecture is a high availability solution for computing, mainly used to ensure that the backup board can seamlessly take over the system in the event of a motherboard failure, thereby improving the reliability and availability of the system.

Name: R多板架构
ZHCN: 在备份冗余有严格要求的场景，我们会设置一个主板和多个备板协同运行，在主板出现致命故障时将进程无缝切换到备板以实现主备板互切，赋予设备更高的稳定性。
ENUS: In scenarios with strict requirements for backup redundancy, we will set up a motherboard and multiple backup boards to work together. In the event of a fatal failure on the motherboard, the process will seamlessly switch to the backup board to achieve mutual switching between the primary and backup boards, giving the device higher stability.

Name: 基础激光应用
ZHCN: 基础激光应用
ENUS: Basic Laser Applications

Name: T基础激光应用
ZHCN: 通过磁场以及棱镜和透镜组的作用，产生的激光在钻井，切割，激发等离子体等领域都有重要作用。
ENUS: The laser generated through the action of magnetic field, prism and lens group plays an important role in drilling, cutting, plasma excitation and other fields.

Name: 激光发生器
ZHCN: 激光发生器
ENUS: Laser Generator

Name: I激光发生器
ZHCN: 通过磁场以及棱镜和透镜组的作用，可以高效地产生激光，改进后的激光发生器更稳定，性能也更好。
ENUS: Through the action of magnetic field, prism and lens group, laser can be efficiently generated, and the improved laser generator is more stable and has better performance.

Name: R光栅激发器
ZHCN: 利用光栅石可以制作大功率激发器的特性，制造激光发生器。
ENUS: Tar Fuel Rod

Name: 辉银矿
ZHCN: 辉银矿
ENUS: Argentite

Name: I辉银矿
ZHCN: 辉银矿是一种硫化银矿物，在银矿中属于最具开采价值的种类。
ENUS: Argentite is a type of silver sulfide mineral that is the most valuable for mining in silver mines.

Name: 银矿冶炼
ZHCN: 银矿冶炼
ENUS: Silver Ore Smelting

Name: T银矿冶炼
ZHCN: 古时银作为货币而开采使用，到了现代，银因在电子，光学领域的优秀性质依旧备受关注。
ENUS: In ancient times, silver was mined and used as currency, but in modern times, it still attracts attention due to its excellent properties in the fields of electronics and optics.

Name: R银矿冶炼
ZHCN: 将辉银矿进行氧化焙烧，把硫氧化为硫酸根，再还原熔炼出粗银和酸性气体，将酸性气体回收为硫酸做后续处理使用。
ENUS: Oxidation roasting of pyroxene ore to oxidize sulfur into sulfate ions, followed by reduction smelting to produce crude silver and acidic gases. The acidic gases are recovered as sulfuric acid for subsequent processing.

Name: 电解冶银
ZHCN: 电解冶银
ENUS: Electrolytic Silver Smelting

Name: R电解冶银
ZHCN: 将粗银用硫酸溶解，再进行电解精炼，最终在阴极得到高纯度的银。
ENUS: Dissolve crude silver in sulfuric acid, then refine it by electrolysis, and finally obtain high-purity silver at the cathode.

Name: 粗银
ZHCN: 粗银
ENUS: Unpurified Silver

Name: I粗银
ZHCN: 银矿初步冶炼的产物，含有铜铝等杂质，可以进一步冶炼提纯，也可以粉碎后参杂铜做成导电浆料供印刷电路使用。
ENUS: The initial smelting products of silver mines contain impurities such as copper and aluminum, which can be further refined and purified. They can also be crushed and mixed with copper to make conductive paste for use in printed circuits.

Name: 纯银
ZHCN: 纯银
ENUS: Sterling Silver

Name: I纯银
ZHCN: 电解精炼后的高纯银，纯度达到99.99%，可以利用其优异的导电性能做成导电银浆，也可以利用其极高的光反射率应用于光学器件的制造中。
ENUS: After electrolytic refining, the purity of high-purity silver reaches 99.99%. Its excellent conductivity can be used to make conductive silver paste, and its extremely high light reflectivity can also be applied in the manufacturing of optical devices.

Name: 导电银浆
ZHCN: 导电银浆
ENUS: Conductive Silver Paste

Name: T导电银浆
ZHCN: 银的导电性远高于铜，但因为银的储量远低于铜，一般不会直接将银压印在电路板上，而是粉碎后与有机溶剂一起制成导电银浆印刷在电路板上。
ENUS: The conductivity of silver is much higher than that of copper, but because the storage capacity of silver is much lower than that of copper, silver is generally not directly imprinted on circuit boards. Instead, it is crushed and mixed with organic solvents to make conductive silver paste and printed on circuit boards.

Name: I导电银浆
ZHCN: 用于印刷电路用的导电浆料，因其混杂了导电性能最佳的金属：银，因此其印刷的电路产品广泛应用于高频电路、精密电子、航空航天等领域。
ENUS: The conductive paste used for printed circuits is widely used in high-frequency circuits, precision electronics, aerospace and other fields due to its mixture of the best conductive metal: silver.

Name: 银铜混合浆料
ZHCN: 银铜混合浆料
ENUS: Silver Copper Mixed Paste

Name: R银铜混合浆料
ZHCN: 对银纯度要求不高的场合，可以将粗银与铜混合制成银铜粉末，与有机溶剂混合制造而成。
ENUS: In situations where silver purity is not a high requirement, coarse silver can be mixed with copper to produce silver copper powder, which can then be mixed with organic solvents for manufacturing.

Name: I光子合并器
ZHCN: 将棱镜表面切割成纳米光栅再重新组装，在特定结构的组合下连续吸收多个低能量的光子后会发出一个高能量的光子。
ENUS: Cutting the prism surface into a nano grating and reassembling it will emit a high-energy photon after continuously absorbing multiple low-energy photons in a specific structure combination.

Name: 银透镜合并器
ZHCN: 银透镜合并器
ENUS: Silver Lens Combiner

Name: R银透镜合并器
ZHCN: 银透镜具有高折射率和低色散的优点，在光子合并器中，镀银透镜可以起到关键作用，银层激发的表面等离子体可复原倏逝波，增强光的强度，从而实现光子的能级合并。
ENUS: Silver lenses have the advantages of high refractive index and low dispersion. In photon combiners, silver plated lenses can play a key role. The surface plasma excited by the silver layer can recover evanescent waves, enhance the intensity of light, and achieve photon energy level merging.

Name: 润滑油
ZHCN: 润滑油
ENUS: lubricating Oil

Name: T润滑油
ZHCN: 润滑油是用在各种机械设备上以减少摩擦，保护机械及加工件的液体或半固体润滑剂，主要起润滑、辅助冷却、防锈、清洁、密封和缓冲等作用，可以大幅延长使用寿命或维持设备流畅运转。
ENUS: Lubricating oil is a liquid or semi-solid lubricant used on various mechanical equipment to reduce friction, protect machinery and processed parts, mainly for lubrication, auxiliary cooling, rust prevention, cleaning, sealing, and buffering purposes. It can greatly extend the service life or maintain smooth operation of equipment.

Name: I润滑油
ZHCN: 从原油提炼的润滑剂，主要对机械零件起润滑、辅助冷却、防锈、清洁、密封和缓冲等作用，能提高机械的效率和大大延长机械的使用寿命。
ENUS: Lubricants extracted from crude oil mainly provide lubrication, auxiliary cooling, rust prevention, cleaning, sealing, and buffering for mechanical parts, which can improve the efficiency of machinery and greatly extend its service life.

Name: 高速连接器
ZHCN: 高速连接器
ENUS: High-speed Connector

Name: T高速连接器
ZHCN: 利用银优良导电性能专门制造的信号交互器，能以极高的速度完成信号传递，在多设备组网，量子计算领域有重要应用。
ENUS: The signal interactor specially manufactured using silver's excellent conductivity can complete signal transmission at extremely high speeds, and has important applications in multi device networking and quantum computing.

Name: I高速连接器
ZHCN: 专门负责设备与设备之间连接通信用模块，提供专业的低时延高速读写服务。
ENUS: Specially responsible for connecting communication modules between devices, providing professional low latency and high-speed read/write services.

Name: 润滑电动机
ZHCN: 润滑电动机
ENUS: Lubricating Electric Motor

Name: R润滑电动机
ZHCN: 将润滑油注入转轴，齿轮等易磨损部位，可以大大延长零件的使用寿命。
ENUS: Injecting lubricating oil into easily worn parts such as shafts and gears can greatly extend the service life of the components.

Name: 木炭
ZHCN: 木炭
ENUS: Charcoal

Name: R木炭
ZHCN: 将原木切割破碎，烘干水分后，进一步加热木材，使其在无氧环境下炭化，最后得到木炭。
ENUS: Cut and crush the logs, dry the moisture, further heat the wood to carbonize it in an anaerobic environment, and finally obtain charcoal.

Name: 热解
ZHCN: 热解
ENUS: Pyrolysis

Name: R热解
ZHCN: 在无氧或极低氧环境下加热生物质，分解为生物油、和氢气，生物油经精炼可替代化石燃料。
ENUS: Heating biomass in anaerobic or extremely low oxygen environments decomposes it into bio oil and hydrogen gas, and bio oil can be refined to replace fossil fuels.

Name: 水生植物培养
ZHCN: 水生植物培养
ENUS: Cultivation Of Aquatic Plants

Name: R水生植物培养
ZHCN: 水生蕨类，绿藻等生物群，作为首批出现的植物，在富营养水体中能大量繁殖，是优质的生物质来源。
ENUS: Aquatic ferns, green algae and other biological groups, as the first plants to appear, can reproduce in large quantities in eutrophic water bodies and are high-quality sources of biomass.

Name: 培养皿
ZHCN: 培养皿
ENUS: Petri Dish

Name: I培养皿

Name: I近防电浆炮
ZHCN: 由战舰的近防炮改造而来，发射以磁场约束的等离子霰流，在近距离上破坏力远超其他级别的炮台。以近防为目的的设计让它可以遭受大量攻击而正常运转。尽管行星内大气磁场与重力的扰动作用导致射程比太空更短，但当地面防线告急时，它依然是最可靠的近防武器。
ENUS: Adapted from the close range guns of warships, it fires plasma plumes constrained by magnetic fields, causing far greater destructive power at close range than other levels of turrets. The design aimed at close range defense allows it to withstand a large number of attacks and operate normally. Although the disturbance caused by the atmospheric magnetic field and gravity within the planet results in a shorter range than in space, it remains the most reliable close range weapon when ground defenses are in crisis.

Name: T近防电浆炮
ZHCN:
舰炮上陆是将星舰使用的舰炮系统改装部署到行星陆地上的战术，主要用于增强地面部队的火力支援能力。就如近防电浆炮，原为星舰上的近防武器，能发射连绵不绝的等离子霰流拦截导弹或重创近距离的对手，以近防为目的的设计让它可以遭受大量攻击而正常运转。尽管行星内大气磁场与重力的扰动作用导致射程比起太空严重缩短，但当地面防线告急时，它依然是最可靠的近防武器。
由于COSMO禁止在大气层内使用湮灭武器，因此近防电浆炮<color="#FD965ECC">禁止使用反物质轨道弹</color>
ENUS:
Naval gun landing is a tactic of modifying and deploying the naval gun system used by starships to planetary land, mainly used to enhance the firepower support capability of ground forces. Just like the close range plasma cannon, originally a close range weapon on starships, it can launch continuous plasma jet interception missiles or inflict heavy damage on close range opponents. Its design for close range defense allows it to withstand a large number of attacks and operate normally. Although the disturbance caused by the atmospheric magnetic field and gravity within the planet significantly shortens its range compared to space, it remains the most reliable close range weapon when ground defenses are in crisis.
Due to COSMO's ban on the use of annihilation weapons in the atmosphere, close range plasma guns are <color="#FD965ECC">prohibited from using Antimatter Orbital Shell</color>

<color="#FD965ECC">只能建造在轨道炮座上</color>

ENUS:
Commonly known as" nuclear battery ",By utilizing the Seebeck effect to convert the decay heat of plutonium-238 into electrical energy, although the power is not high, it no longer requires the addition of fuel after production, and has a half-life of 89 years. Its stable performance and maintenance free characteristics make it play an important role in remote areas where power generation and transmission are difficult.
<color="#FD965ECC">This building has unconditional permanent power generation</color>

Name: 永固型节点构造
ZHCN: 永固型节点构造
ENUS: Permanent Node Construction

Name: T永固型节点构造
ZHCN: 恒星并不会一成不变，细微的波动就会在表面掀起太阳风，射线爆发，高能粒子轰击对于近在咫尺的戴森球来说无异于被海量的粒子武器攻击，凡物制造的防护层在轰击中很快就会变得如饼干般酥脆，若要建设永固型戴森球节点，我们需要比范德华力更加强大的作用力制成的材料：零素装甲。
ENUS: Stars do not remain unchanged, subtle fluctuations can trigger solar winds, burst rays, and high-energy particle bombardment on the surface. For the Dyson sphere that is close at hand, it is no different from being attacked by a massive amount of particle weapons. The protective layer made of ordinary objects will quickly become crispy like cookies during bombardment. To build a permanent Dyson sphere node, we need a material made of a force stronger than van der Waals force: zero element armor.

Name: R永固型节点构造
ZHCN: 使用零素装甲防护的永固型戴森球节点组件。
ENUS: A permanent Dyson ball node component protected by zero element armor.

Name: 激光钻井平台
ZHCN: 激光钻井平台
ENUS: Laser Drilling Platform

Name: I激光钻井平台
ZHCN: 通过激光对岩石的气化，破碎作用，可以获得远超实体钻头的钻探效率和深度，高效地获取地层深处的液态资源。
ENUS: By using laser to gasify and break rocks, drilling efficiency and depth far exceed that of solid drill bits, and liquid resources deep in the formation can be efficiently obtained.

Name: 激光钻井技术
ZHCN: 激光钻井技术
ENUS: Laser Drilling Technologyr

Name: T激光钻井技术
ZHCN: 我们先进的激光钻井技术已经完全超越了老式的实体钻头技术，大大提高了深层钻井的效率，促进了工业的迅速发展。
ENUS: Our advanced laser drilling technology has completely surpassed the old-fashioned solid drill bit technology, greatly improving the efficiency of deep drilling and promoting the rapid development of industry.

Name: 碳化硅
ZHCN: 碳化硅
ENUS: Silicon Carbide

Name: I碳化硅
ZHCN: 高性能陶瓷材料，耐热，导热高，强度高。在航空航天，半导体，核能，化工领域都有应用。
ENUS: High performance ceramic material, heat-resistant, high thermal conductivity, and high strength. It has applications in aerospace, semiconductor, nuclear energy, and chemical industries.

Name: 碳化硅（高效）
ZHCN: 碳化硅（高效）
ENUS: Silicon Carbide (Efficient)

Name: R碳化硅（高效）
ZHCN: 莫桑石是天然的碳化硅原矿，如果有莫桑石，我们就能高效地炼制碳化硅。
ENUS: Moissanite is a natural raw material for silicon carbide, and if we have Moissanite, we can efficiently refine silicon carbide.

Name: 深层熔岩
ZHCN: 深层熔岩
ENUS: Deep Lava

Name: I深层熔岩
ZHCN:
来自地质活跃行星的深层地幔物质，富含镓、铼，镧系等稀有金属，要利用好需要进一步的处理。
<color="#FD965ECC">此物品不可星际运输，不可设置为星际供应</color>
ENUS:
The deep mantle material from geologically active planets is rich in rare metals such as gallium, rhenium, and lanthanide series, which require further processing to be utilized effectively.
<color="#FD965ECC">This item is not suitable for interstellar transportation and cannot be set as an interstellar supply</color>

Name: 深层熔岩处理
ZHCN: 深层熔岩处理
ENUS: Deep Lava Processing

Name: R深层熔岩处理
ZHCN: 对深层熔岩进行预处理，分离出富含稀有金属物质的熔融金属。
ENUS: Pre treat deep magma to separate molten metals rich in rare metal substances.

Name: 熔融金属
ZHCN: 熔融金属
ENUS: Molten Metal

Name: I熔融金属
ZHCN:
液态熔融状流体，分离了部分杂质，富集了镓、铟、锡等稀有金属元素，是制造液态金属的重要原料，也可用于高效金属冶炼。
<color="#FD965ECC">此物品不可星际运输，不可设置为星际供应</color>
ENUS:
Liquid molten fluid separates some impurities and enriches rare metal elements such as gallium, indium, and tin. It is an important raw material for manufacturing liquid metals and can also be used for efficient metal smelting.
<color="#FD965ECC">This item is not suitable for interstellar transportation and cannot be set as an interstellar supply</color>

Name: 液态金属制造
ZHCN: 液态金属制造
ENUS: Liquid Metal Manufacturing

Name: R液态金属制造
ZHCN: 对熔融稀有金属进行高温高压酸浸取，制造出流动的液态金属。
ENUS: High temperature and high pressure acid leaching of molten rare metals to produce flowing liquid metals.

Name: 液态金属
ZHCN: 液态金属
ENUS: liquid Metal

Name: I液态金属
ZHCN: 具有高强度、高硬度、高弹性、高耐蚀性等特点的不定型金属，在电场的控制下可自主移动，自主变形，吸收金属。在粒子工业和航空航天领域有着不可替代的作用。曾经用于制作T1000。
ENUS: Amorphous metals with high strength, hardness, elasticity, and corrosion resistance can move, deform, and absorb metals autonomously under the control of an electric field. It plays an irreplaceable role in the particle industry and aerospace fields.Previously used to make T1000.

Name: 金属废液
ZHCN: 金属废液
ENUS: Metal Waste Liquid

Name: I金属废液
ZHCN: 加工磁流体的副产物，内部的纳米结构已无法成型，只有加热熔融将微观结构全部抹除才能重新加工。
ENUS: As a byproduct of processing magnetic fluids, the internal nanostructures cannot be formed and can only be reprocessed by heating and melting to completely remove the microstructure.

Name: 预加工
ZHCN: 预加工
ENUS: Pre-Processing

Name: T预加工
ZHCN: 自动化流水线总是给人严丝合缝的感觉，然而实际上原料依旧有误差，成分的误差，形状的误差，这些规定范围内的误差不影响工业机器的正常加工，但要达成更快的加工速度，更高的良品率，则需要更加精细，更加完美的原部件。通过加装智能伺服器，对原部件先进行预加工，使其更加适配后续的加工步骤，从而实现高效的智慧工厂。
ENUS: Automated assembly lines always give people a feeling of tight fitting, but in reality, there are still errors in raw materials, composition, and shape. These errors within the specified range do not affect the normal processing of industrial machines, but to achieve faster processing speed and higher yield, more refined and perfect raw parts are needed. By installing intelligent servers, the original components are pre processed to better adapt to subsequent processing steps, thereby achieving an efficient smart factory.

Name: 预加工伺服器
ZHCN: 预加工伺服器
ENUS: Preprocessing Server

Name: I预加工伺服器
ZHCN:
通过大量传感器以及服务器群集，对所属工厂的每一批原料进行精细地测量，并实时生成对应的预加工步骤并操控机床完成，从而使正式加工环节能以更快的速度，更高的良品率加工出成品。
<color="#FD965ECC">放置在制造台的插件槽生效，使该制造台以二级增产状态运行</color>
<color="#FD965ECC">该伺服器会使安装的制造台额外增加5.04mw能耗</color>
ENUS:
Through a large number of sensors and server clusters, each batch of raw materials in the factory is finely measured, and corresponding pre-processing steps are generated in real time and controlled by the machine tool to complete them, so that the formal processing process can produce finished products at a faster speed and higher yield.
<color="#FD965ECC">The plug-in slot placed in the manufacturing station takes effect, allowing the manufacturing station to operate in a secondary production state</color>
<color="#FD965ECC">This server will add an additional 5.04mw of energy consumption to the installed manufacturing station</color>

Name: 活性化编程
ZHCN: 活性化编程
ENUS: Activation Programming

Name: T活性化编程
ZHCN: 物质的世界千变万化，原料零件的误差也千差万别，用一般编程穷举所有情况并预设方案完成预加工终究有些力不从心。靠量子计算架构，我们得以部署深度学习网络，它不再是死板的预设程序，而是会自己学习，分析，生成方案的半活性化自动程序集。
ENUS: The material world is ever-changing, and the errors of raw materials and parts vary greatly. Using general programming to exhaustively search for all situations and preset solutions to complete pre-processing is ultimately somewhat inadequate. By relying on quantum computing architecture, we are able to deploy deep learning networks, which are no longer rigid preset programs, but semi active automated program sets that learn, analyze, and generate solutions on their own.

Name: 智能伺服器
ZHCN: 智能伺服器
ENUS: Intelligent Server

Name: I智能伺服器
ZHCN:
部署了活性化深度学习网络的量子伺服器，强大的自适应学习能力能根据原料之间细微的差别专门定制出更加贴合实际情况的预加工方案。
<color="#FD965ECC">放置在制造台的插件槽生效，使该制造台以三级增产状态运行</color>
<color="#FD965ECC">该伺服器会使安装的制造台额外增加12.6mw能耗</color>
ENUS:
A quantum server with activated deep learning networks has been deployed, and its powerful adaptive learning ability can customize pre-processing solutions that are more tailored to actual situations based on subtle differences between raw materials.
<color="#FD965ECC">The plug-in slot placed in the manufacturing station takes effect, allowing the manufacturing station to operate in a three-level production increase state</color>
<color="#FD965ECC">This server will add an additional 12.6mw of energy consumption to the installed manufacturing station</color>

Name: 水冷伺服器
ZHCN: 水冷伺服器
ENUS: Water Cooled Server

Name: R水冷伺服器
ZHCN: CPU全负荷运转时温度会急剧飙升，使用风扇进行风冷的优点是结构简单，制造简便。但是要榨取处理器更高的性能时，就需要水冷，使用水来完成更高效的热量转移循环。
ENUS: When the CPU is running at full load, the temperature will soar sharply. The advantage of using a fan for air cooling is its simple structure and easy manufacturing. But to extract higher performance from the processor, water cooling is needed, using water to complete a more efficient heat transfer cycle.

Name: 星环伺服天穹
ZHCN: 星环伺服天穹
ENUS: OrbitalRing Servo Sky Dome

Name: T星环伺服天穹
ZHCN: 星环代表了行星开发的高度，在高度发达的工业行星，星环能从伺服天穹组件统筹协调全行星的工厂，抬头就能望见的星环将在天穹俯视全球的工厂，并为全球工厂提供预加工伺服能力。
ENUS: OrbitalRing represent the height of planetary development. In highly developed industrial planets, Orbital Rings can coordinate factories across the planet from servo dome components. The visible Orbital Rings will overlook factories around the world from the sky and provide pre-processing servo capabilities for factories worldwide.

Name: 伺服天穹组件
ZHCN: 伺服天穹组件
ENUS: Servo Sky Component

Name: I伺服天穹组件
ZHCN:
安装在天枢座的大型服务器群集组件，利用石墨烯的超高导热性，以面积巨大的散热膜维持这个行星级超算服务器的散热，当所属的星环建设完整时，将为全行星的制造台提供预加工伺服能力。
<color="#FD965ECC">建造在拥有完整星环的天枢座，且供电充足时，为全球的制造台提供一级增产状态</color>
ENUS:
The large server cluster component installed in the constellation of the Celestial Pivot utilizes the ultra-high thermal conductivity of graphene and a large heat dissipation film to maintain the heat dissipation of this row star supercomputer server. When the corresponding Orbital Ring is fully constructed, it will provide pre-processing servo capabilities for the manufacturing stations of the entire planet.
<color="#FD965ECC">Built in the constellation of Nexus with a complete orbital ring and sufficient power supply, it provides a first level production status for manufacturing stations worldwide</color>

Name: 智能方尖碑
ZHCN: 智能方尖碑
ENUS: Smart Obelisk

Name: T智能方尖碑
ZHCN: 传统计算架构的超算提升算力是有上限的，如果想要对全球的工厂进行更加细致，更加高效的加工方案调整，就需要以量子比特架构为主的量子超算组成的全球协调组件：智能方尖碑。
ENUS: The supercomputing of traditional computing architectures has a limit to improving computing power. If we want to make more detailed and efficient adjustments to processing plans for factories around the world, we need a global coordination component composed mainly of quantum supercomputers based on quantum bit architecture: the intelligent obelisk.

Name: I智能方尖碑
ZHCN:
安装在天枢座的超级量子超算，强大的算力通过星环能对全球每一个工厂的每一次制造过程都提供独立的定制优化加工方案，只有极为繁荣的工业星才会安装这种协调中枢。
<color="#FD965ECC">建造在拥有完整星环的天枢座，且供电充足时，为全球的制造台提供二级增产状态</color>
ENUS:
The super quantum supercomputer installed in the constellation of the Celestial Pivot provides independent customized and optimized processing solutions for every manufacturing process in every factory around the world through its powerful computing power. Only highly prosperous industrial stars would install this coordination center.
<color="#FD965ECC">Built in the constellation of Nexus with a complete orbital ring and sufficient power supply, it provides a second level production status for manufacturing stations worldwide</color>

Name: 亿万械国
ZHCN: 亿万械国
ENUS: Billion Mechanical Nation

Name: T亿万械国
ZHCN: 量子虚拟生命那极快的自更新速度和量子生命特有的多线程思维是天生的机械操作者，只要提供足够的算力，传感器触及之地，皆为机械的国土。
ENUS: Quantum virtual life, with its extremely fast self-updating speed and the unique multi-threaded thinking characteristic of quantum life, is a natural mechanical operator. As long as sufficient computing power is provided, wherever sensors reach, it becomes a mechanical territory.

Name: I亿万械国
ZHCN:
加载了量子虚拟生命的超级量子超算，在天枢座上能将这个生命的“触感”延申至全球的制造台，其“机魂”能更加细致的分辨出零件的差异，哪怕在传感器里它们的数据完全一样。
<color="#FD965ECC">建造在拥有完整星环的天枢座，且供电充足时，为全球的制造台提供三级增产状态</color>
ENUS:
The super quantum supercomputer, loaded with quantum virtual life, can extend the "touch" of this life to manufacturing platforms worldwide on the Tian Shu Zuo. Its "machine soul" can distinguish the differences in parts more precisely, even if their data are exactly the same in the sensors.
<color="#FD965ECC">Built in the constellation of Nexus with a complete orbital ring and sufficient power supply, it provides a third level production status for manufacturing stations worldwide</color>

Name: 铀燃料棒
ZHCN: 铀燃料棒
ENUS: Uranium Fuel Rod

Name: I铀燃料棒
ZHCN: 用碳化硅外壳封装的铀核燃料，铀235浓度到达20%，能够在有限的空间内提供稳定且强大的能量输出。
ENUS: The uranium nuclear fuel is encapsulated in a silicon carbide shell, with a uranium-235 concentration of up to 20%, which can provide stable and powerful energy output in a limited space.

Name: 碳化钛合金
ZHCN: 碳化钛合金
ENUS: Titanium carbide alloy

Name: I碳化钛合金
ZHCN: 利用钛在不同温度下晶格结构的特点，加入准确比例的碳元素，使相变温度及相分含量达到完美平衡的一种新型合金材料，有更高的强度，更好的韧性。
ENUS: A new type of alloy material that utilizes the lattice structure characteristics of titanium at different temperatures and adds accurate proportions of carbon elements to achieve a perfect balance between phase transition temperature and phase composition content. It has higher strength and better toughness.

Name: I氘核燃料棒
ZHCN: 将氘制成液氘燃料棒，获得更强大的能量，是小型聚变系统的燃料来源。
ENUS: Make deuterium into deuteron fuel rods as a better source of energy. These fuel rods are often used in fusion systems.

Name: I反物质燃料棒
ZHCN: 将反物质制成更稳定的燃料棒，就可以更安全地利用其强大的能量。
ENUS: Stabilize antimatter into fuel rods, so that it can be used safely and effectively.

Name: 离子推进器
ZHCN: 离子推进器
ENUS: Ion Thruster

Name: I离子推进器
ZHCN: 离子推进器通过电弧加热推进介质，用磁场将离子约束喷射出去，有很高的能量利用率，是太空航行的首选。
ENUS: Ion thrusters use electric arcs to heat the propulsion medium and use magnetic fields to confine and eject ions, resulting in high energy utilization efficiency and making them the preferred choice for space travel.

Name: 蓄电器mk2
ZHCN: 蓄电器mk2
ENUS: Battery MK2

Name: I蓄电器mk2
ZHCN: 使用金属氢做储能介质的蓄电器，储能容量和充放电功率都有大幅提升。
ENUS: The use of metallic hydrogen as an energy storage medium in energy storage devices has significantly increased energy storage capacity and charging and discharging power.

Name: 蓄电器mk2（满）
ZHCN: 蓄电器mk2（满）
ENUS: Battery MK2(full)

Name: I蓄电器mk2（满）
ZHCN: 满电量状态的金属氢蓄电器。
ENUS: A metal hydrogen storage device in a fully charged state.

Name: 植物纤维
ZHCN: 植物纤维
ENUS: Plant Fiber

Name: I植物纤维
ZHCN: 植物纤维是纤维素与各种营养物质结合生成的丝状或者絮状物，对于植物具有支撑、连接、包裹、充填等作用，广泛存在于植物秆茎、根系、果实、果壳中。
ENUS: Plant fiber is a filamentous or flocculent substance formed by the combination of cellulose and various nutrients, which plays a supporting, connecting, enveloping, and filling role in plants. It is widely present in plant stems, roots, fruits, and fruit shells.

Name: 生物质
ZHCN: 生物质
ENUS: Biomass

Name: I生物质
ZHCN: 通过光合作用而形成的各种有机体，包括所有的动植物和微生物都属于生物质。
ENUS: Various organisms formed through photosynthesis, including all animals, plants, and microorganisms, belong to biomass.

Name: 金属氢
ZHCN: 金属氢
ENUS: Metallic Hydrogen

Name: I金属氢
ZHCN: 将氢压缩成液态，固态后继续压缩，直至电子在超高压下逸散而出，形成金属般的导电性，然后使用石墨烯制造纳米笼包裹以及金属钛吸附，利用化学内应力维持其常压下存在，便形成了有金属性质的临界固体氢：金属氢。
ENUS: Compressing hydrogen into a liquid state and then continuing to compress it in a solid state until electrons escape under ultra-high pressure, forming a metallic conductivity. Then, Using graphene to fabricate nanocage encapsulation and metal titanium adsorption, and utilizing chemical internal stress to maintain its existence under normal pressure, forming a critical solid hydrogen with metallic properties: metallic hydrogen.

Name: 磁流体
ZHCN: 磁流体
ENUS: magnetic fluid

Name: I磁流体
ZHCN: 将纳米磁性微粒混合进液态金属和重油组成的介质中，形成磁流体，由于磁流体具有液体的流动性和固体的磁性，使得磁流体呈现出许多特殊的磁、光、电现象，在高端工业场景有重要应用。
ENUS: Mixing nano magnetic particles into a medium composed of liquid metal and heavy oil to form magnetic fluid. Due to the fluidity of liquid and the magnetism of solid, magnetic fluid exhibits many special magnetic, optical, and electrical phenomena, which have important applications in high-end industrial scenarios.

Name: 激素营养液
ZHCN: 激素营养液
ENUS: Hormone Nutrient Solution

Name: I激素营养液
ZHCN: 富含促进植物生长的激素与微量元素的水培营养液，能大幅增加作物的培育生长。
ENUS: A hydroponic nutrient solution rich in hormones and trace elements that promote plant growth can significantly increase crop cultivation and growth.

Name: 营养液调配
ZHCN: 营养液调配
ENUS: Nutrient Solution Preparation

Name: R营养液调配
ZHCN: 将激素生长菌群与水和土壤提取物混合，生产出促进植物生长的激素与微量元素的营养液，比起死板的机器，这些世世代代与植物伴生的伙伴更懂得生长需要什么。
ENUS: Mixing hormone growth bacteria with water and soil extracts to produce nutrient solutions containing hormones and trace elements that promote plant growth, these partners who have been associated with plants for generations understand what growth requires more than rigid machines.

Name: 绿肥营养液
ZHCN: 绿肥营养液
ENUS: Green Manure Nutrient Solution

Name: R绿肥营养液
ZHCN: 激素菌群能将自然界中的游离元素固定为可供植物直接吸收的化合物，自然也能将生物尸骸中的营养素分离出来再使用，效率也更高。
ENUS: Hormonal microbiota can fix free elements in nature into compounds that can be directly absorbed by plants, and can also separate nutrients from biological remains for reuse, with higher efficiency.

Name: 高级生物塑料
ZHCN: 高级生物塑料
ENUS: Advanced Bioplastics

Name: R高级生物塑料
ZHCN: 通过共生菌核替代宿主生物反应的特性，可以诱导它对有机质进行分解重构，直接生成具有特定纳米结构的类塑料有机高分子。
ENUS: By replacing the host organism's response with symbiotic sclerotia, it can induce the decomposition and reconstruction of organic matter, directly generating plastic like organic polymers with specific nanostructures.

Name: 高级有机合金
ZHCN: 高级有机合金

ENUS: Synchronous Orbit Antiparticle Annihilation Reactor

Name: T同步轨道正反物质湮灭堆
ZHCN: 完全质能转换，这是自从发现质能转换公式后能源工程师们追求的至高杰作，核裂变核聚变释放的能量与正反物质完全湮灭比起来犹如五号电池一般袖珍，一般的殖民星一座反物质堆就足以供应整颗星球电力。鉴于湮灭反应的危险性，湮灭反应堆不允许建在地表，只能建在同步轨道，如果真的发生不可挽回的事故时，这样起码还能保持星球的完整：在增加了数颗破碎星球后，COSMO做出了如此规定，整座建筑被拆分为复杂且庞大同步轨道反物质堆基座，与反物质堆核心。
ENUS: Complete mass energy conversion is the ultimate masterpiece pursued by energy engineers since the discovery of the mass energy conversion formula. The energy released by nuclear fission and fusion is as small as a fifth battery compared to the complete annihilation of antimatter. A typical colonial star's antimatter stack is enough to supply electricity to the entire planet. Given the danger of annihilation reactions, annihilation reactors are not allowed to be built on the surface and can only be built in synchronous orbit. In the event of an irreversible accident, this can at least maintain the integrity of the planet: after adding several shattered planets, COSMO has made such a regulation that the entire building is divided into a complex and massive synchronous orbit anti material reactor base and an anti material reactor core.

Name: T同步轨道正反物质湮灭堆结果

ENUS: The core of the annihilation reactor is composed of the most sophisticated annihilation control system, and the seemingly exposed core structure is actually protected by the strongest shield system. The energy released by annihilation is mostly converted into gamma rays, with only a few converted into the blue purple visible spectrum.<color="#FD965ECC">Must be built on Orbital Antimatter Reactor Base</color>

Being in a synchronous orbit can ensure that the planet will not be affected in the event that the final plan fails, and the design of the exposed core can maximize the explosive power to burst into space.

Only it can sustain the logistics needs of a cross galaxy civilization.

Name: T动能武器伤害无限
ZHCN: 客观提升动能武器伤害已达瓶颈，若想继续提升，则需要分析敌方的结构，瞄准弱点，让相同的攻击达成更大的毁伤效果，以此达到事实上的“提高伤害”。
ENUS: The objective improvement of kinetic energy weapon damage has reached a bottleneck. If you want to continue to improve, you need to analyze the enemy's structure, target weaknesses, and achieve greater damage effects with the same attack, in order to achieve the actual "increase in damage".

Name: T能量武器伤害无限

ENUS: The objective increase in energy weapon damage has reached a bottleneck. If you want to continue to improve, you need to analyze the enemy's structure, target weaknesses, and achieve greater damage effects with the same attack, in order to achieve the actual "increase in damage".

Name: T爆破武器伤害无限

Name: 黑盒
ZHCN: 黑盒
ENUS: Black Box

Name: T黑盒
ZHCN: 其他文明的遗物，全封闭的外壳刻画了一个原料异常简单的配方，而这个配方的产物是它自己，很明显这个设备是文明发生断代时用来快速重启文明的工具，为此刻画在表面的配方甚至采用了纯绘画方式来表达，工厂真正的加工设施不在当前维度，而是类似于伊卡洛斯背包的内空间。暴力拆解外壳只会导致真正的内核消失在空间流中。
ENUS: The fully enclosed shell of a relic from other civilizations depicts an exceptionally simple formula, and the product of this formula is itself. It is obvious that this device is a tool used to quickly restart civilization when it is cut off. Therefore, the formula depicted on the surface even uses pure painting to express it. The actual processing facilities of the factory are not in the current dimension, but in the interior space similar to the Icarus backpack. Violent disassembly of the shell will only cause the true kernel to disappear into the spatial stream.

Name: I黑盒
ZHCN: 其他文明的遗物，全封闭黑盒内是处于内空间中的万能工厂，因为暴力拆解外壳只会导致真正的内核消失在空间流中，所以我们对其内部构造还一无所知。
ENUS: The relics of other civilizations, fully enclosed black boxes, are universal factories located in the inner space, because violent dismantling of the shell will only cause the true core to disappear into the spatial flow, so we still know nothing about its internal structure.

Name: 次级维度工厂
ZHCN: 次级维度工厂
ENUS: Secondary Dimension Factory

Name: I次级维度工厂
ZHCN: 将黑盒进行集成，用曲率引擎加强对虚数空间的开辟能力与航行能力，以此获得能在次级维度行动的工厂。
ENUS: Integrate the Black Box and enhance its ability to open up imaginary space and navigate with a curvature engine, in order to obtain a factory that can operate in the secondary dimension.

Name: T次级维度工厂
ZHCN: 将拥有内空间能力的工厂沉入次级维度，在虚数空间跟随伊卡洛斯，可以为伊卡洛斯提供随时随地的工业制造支持。最终，伊卡洛斯本身就是一座移动工厂。
ENUS: Sinking factories with inner space capabilities into the secondary dimension and following Icarus in imaginary space can provide industrial manufacturing support for Icarus anytime, anywhere. In the end, Icarus itself is a mobile factory.

Name: 奇夸克样本
ZHCN: 奇夸克样本
ENUS: Strange Quark Sample

Name: I奇夸克样本
ZHCN: 在中子星超高重力环境下，电子被压入质子形成中子，在内部更高压力下，中子可能进一步被压溃变成夸克浴，并且产生奇夸克，在中子星之间的碰撞中，奇夸克团就可能飞射而出，散落在外星。
ENUS: In the ultra-high gravity environment of neutron stars, electrons are pressed into protons to form neutrons. At higher internal pressures, neutrons may be further crushed into quark baths and produce strange quarks. In collisions between neutron stars, strange quark clusters may fly out and scatter in outer space.

Name: 奇夸克同化反应
ZHCN: 奇夸克同化反应
ENUS: Strange Quark Assimilation Reaction

Name: T奇夸克同化反应
ZHCN: 奇夸克有很多奇怪性质，比如稳定性，不仅稳定到在中子星外存在，甚至稳定到：在一定条件下将其他物质也同化成它一起稳定。
ENUS: Odd quarks have many strange properties, such as stability, which is not only stable enough to exist outside neutron stars, but even stable enough to assimilate other matter into them under certain conditions.

Name: 奇异同化反应
ZHCN: 奇异同化反应
ENUS: Singular Assimilation Reaction

Name: R奇异同化反应
ZHCN: 利用奇夸克的同化反应，高效生产奇异物质，需要小心保存奇夸克，否则无限同化的奇夸克将导致星球毁灭级安全生产事故。
ENUS: To efficiently produce strange matter through the assimilation reaction of strange quarks, it is necessary to carefully preserve the strange quarks, otherwise infinite assimilation of strange quarks will lead to planetary destruction level safety production accidents.

Name: 物质重组
ZHCN: 物质重组
ENUS: Material Recombination

Name: I硫酸
ZHCN: 原油化工重要原料之一，也可以用流体抽取平台从硫酸海洋中直接抽取获得。
ENUS: One of the important raw materials for crude oil chemical industry, it can also be directly extracted from sulfuric acid ocean using Fluid Extraction Platform.

Name: 轻油
ZHCN: 轻油
ENUS: light oil

Name: I轻油
ZHCN: 一种石油炼制产品。它主要由低分子量的烷烃、环烷烃和芳香烃组成，是塑料、航空燃料的重要原料。
ENUS: A petroleum refining product. It is mainly composed of low molecular weight alkanes, cycloalkanes, and aromatic hydrocarbons, and is an important raw material for plastics and aviation fuels.

Name: 地下冰层
ZHCN: 地下水源
ENUS: Groundwater

Name: I地下冰层
ZHCN: 地表液态水的存在条件十分苛刻，很多星球会因为各种各样的原因保留不住地表水分，但在厚厚的地层或冻土层的保护下，可能会存在水资源，可以通过激光钻井获得这些宝贵的水资源。
ENUS: The conditions for the existence of surface liquid water are extremely harsh, and many planets may not be able to retain surface water for various reasons. However, under the protection of thick layers or permafrost, there may be water resources that can be obtained through laser drilling.

Name: 重水
ZHCN: 重水
ENUS: heavy water

Name: I重水
ZHCN: 其组成的氢元素为同位素氘，凭借微弱的质量差别由水分馏出来。在核领域有重要应用。
ENUS: The hydrogen element composed of it is the isotope deuterium, which is distilled from water with a slight difference in mass.It has important applications in the nuclear field.

Name: 陶瓷冶炼
ZHCN: 陶瓷冶炼
ENUS: Ceramic smelting

Name: 流速监测器
ZHCN: 流速监测器
ENUS: Traffic Monitor

Name: 未知射线遗留样本
ZHCN: 未知射线遗留样本
ENUS: Unknown Radiation Legacy Samples

Name: I未知射线遗留样本
ZHCN: 从黑海盐滩勘探挖掘到的未知样本，持续散发着某种辐射，疑似遭受过某种强射线照射。获取更多样本进行研究，或许能知道这颗星球发生过什么。
ENUS: The unknown samples excavated from the exploration of the Black Sea salt flats continue to emit some kind of radiation, suspected to have been exposed to some strong radiation. Obtaining more samples for research may reveal what has happened on this planet.

Name: 未知射线研究
ZHCN: 未知射线研究
ENUS: Unknown Radiation Research

Name: T未知射线研究
ZHCN: 研究黑海盐滩上勘探到的射线样本，它或许能告诉我们这颗星球发生了什么，为何整颗星球都没有生命反应，而碳基生命的更替才会产生的原油却浩瀚如海。
ENUS: Studying the radiation samples discovered on the Black Sea salt flats may tell us what happened on this planet, why there was no life reaction on the entire planet, and why the oil produced by the replacement of carbon based life is vast like the sea.

Name: 纳米塑料纤维
ZHCN: 纳米塑料纤维
ENUS: Nano plastic fibers

Name: I纳米塑料纤维
ZHCN: 通过纳米粒子在塑料树脂中的充分分散，有效地提高了塑料的耐热、耐候、耐磨等性能。
ENUS: By fully dispersing nanoparticles in plastic resins, the heat resistance, weather resistance, wear resistance and other properties of plastics are effectively improved.

Name: 气云
ZHCN: 气云
ENUS: Gas Cloud

Name: I气云
ZHCN: 气态巨行星的轨道采集物，采集站初步分馏无法处理的混合物，需要送到专业的化工厂进行处理。
ENUS: The orbit collection of gaseous giant planets requires the initial fractionation of the mixture that cannot be processed by the collection station, and it needs to be sent to a professional chemical plant for processing.

Name: 富勒烯
ZHCN: 富勒烯
ENUS: Fullerene

Name: I富勒烯
ZHCN: 碳原子以五边形或六边形相互连接，最终连为一个球状的碳异形体，被称为富勒烯。
ENUS: Carbon atoms are connected to each other in pentagons or hexagons, ultimately forming a spherical carbon heterostructure known as fullerene.

Name: 气云精炼
ZHCN: 气云精炼
ENUS: Gas Cloud Refining

Name: T气云精炼
ZHCN: 气态巨行星除了富含大量的氢，甲烷之外，深处还有部分碳以及其同素异形体：富勒烯，这亦是种潜力强大的新型材料，等待我们利用起来。
ENUS: Gas giant planets are not only rich in hydrogen and methane, but also contain some carbon and its allotropes: fullerenes, which are powerful new materials waiting for us to utilize.

Name: 气云超精炼
ZHCN: 气云超精炼
ENUS: Gas Cloud Ultra Refining

Name: R气云超精炼
ZHCN:
精细处理气云，分离出更多细微的富勒烯异形体成分。
<color="#FD965ECC">富勒醇</color>与<color="#FD965ECC">富勒烯内嵌银</color>将<color="#FD965ECC">概率</color>产出
ENUS:
Fine processing of gas clouds to separate more subtle fullerene shaped components.
<color="#FD965ECC">Fullerol</color> and <color="#FD965ECC">fullerene-embedded silver</color> will <color="#FD965ECC">probably</color> be produced.

Name: 富勒烯研究
ZHCN: 富勒烯研究
ENUS: Research On Fullerenes

Name: T富勒烯研究
ZHCN: 碳是一种神奇的元素，在材料学上光只有它一种元素就有无定形碳，石墨，钻石，石墨烯，碳纳米管等诸多结构，而现在，还有一种结构：球形碳富勒烯，无论是在球内内嵌原子，还是在球面节点上增加功能基团，都有重要的工业意义。
ENUS: Carbon is a magical element, and in materials science, there are many structures of amorphous carbon, graphite, diamond, graphene, carbon nanotubes, and so on. Nowadays, there is also a structure called spherical carbon fullerene, which has important industrial significance whether it is embedding atoms inside the sphere or adding functional groups to the spherical nodes.

Name: 富勒醇
ZHCN: 富勒醇
ENUS: Fullerol

Name: I富勒醇
ZHCN: 富勒醇是富勒烯的羟基化衍生物，为富勒烯碳骨架上多入了羟基的结构体。增加的水溶性让富勒醇在高端润滑与生物技术中有所应用。
ENUS: Fullerenol is a hydroxylated derivative of fullerene, which is a structure with hydroxyl groups added to the carbon skeleton of fullerene. The increased water solubility enables the application of fuller alcohols in high-end lubrication and biotechnology.

Name: 富勒烯内嵌银
ZHCN: 富勒烯内嵌银
ENUS: Fullerene Embedded With Silver

Name: I富勒烯内嵌银
ZHCN: 富勒烯内嵌银是在富勒烯球状结构中内嵌一个银原子构成的富勒烯衍生物，在磁场，量子计算等领域有重要的作用。
ENUS: Fullerene embedded silver is a fullerene derivative composed of a silver atom embedded in a spherical structure of fullerene, which plays an important role in fields such as magnetic fields and quantum computing.

Name: 富勒烯衍生物应用
ZHCN: 富勒烯衍生物应用
ENUS: Application of Fullerene Derivatives

Name: T富勒烯衍生物应用
ZHCN: 在持续的研究中，我们暂时归纳出两种富勒烯衍生物：富勒醇和内嵌银富勒烯，前者增加了醇基团使其溶于水，得以应用于润滑增产。后者则在永磁体与量子计算领域发挥作用。
ENUS: In our ongoing research, we have tentatively identified two types of fullerene derivatives: fullerene alcohols and embedded silver fullerenes. The former has added alcohol groups to make it soluble in water, making it suitable for lubrication and increased production. The latter plays a role in the fields of permanent magnets and quantum computing.

Name: 富勒醇增产剂
ZHCN: 富勒醇增产剂
ENUS: Fullerenol Yield Enhancer

Name: R富勒醇增产剂
ZHCN: 富勒醇是一种优秀的有机化工中介体，常在两种形状间转换以储存和放出传导物质，使用富勒醇可以轻易合成出增产剂。
ENUS: Fullerenol is an excellent organic chemical intermediate that often transitions between two shapes to store and release conductive substances. It can be easily synthesized into yield increasing agents using Fullerenol.

Name: 富勒银量子比特
ZHCN: 富勒银量子比特
ENUS: Fuller Silver Quantum Bit

Name: R富勒银量子比特
ZHCN: 银原子嵌入石墨烯后，结合了富勒烯碳笼的物理保护特性与金属原子的电子特性，为量子计算提供了稳定的物理平台。其核心优势体现在量子相干性保护、自旋态可调控性及分子级集成能力上。
ENUS: After embedding silver atoms into graphene, the combination of the physical protection properties of fullerene carbon cages and the electronic properties of metal atoms provides a stable physical platform for quantum computing. Its core advantages are reflected in quantum coherence protection, spin state controllability, and molecular level integration capability.

Name: 有机磁胶
ZHCN: 有机磁胶
ENUS: Organic Magnetic Adhesive

Name: I有机磁胶
ZHCN: 磁流体作为一种高级合金，可以在电场磁场的作用下改变形状，而以此为基底制造的有机磁胶，则可以在电场的作用下产生变化的磁场，赋予制造更多可能。
ENUS: Magnetic fluid, as a type of advanced alloy, can change its shape under the action of electric and magnetic fields, while organic magnetic adhesives made on this substrate can generate changing magnetic fields under the action of electric fields, giving manufacturing more possibilities.

Name: 永磁涡轮
ZHCN: 永磁涡轮
ENUS: Permanent Magnet Turbine

Name: T永磁涡轮
ZHCN: 从文明遗物中拼凑整理出来的科技，记录了另一种电磁涡轮的制造方法。
ENUS: The technology pieced together from cultural relics records another method of manufacturing electromagnetic turbines.

Name: R永磁涡轮
ZHCN: 通过将富勒烯内嵌金属制备成高矫顽力永磁体，参与磁悬浮涡轮的制造，能轻易提升电磁涡轮的运行性能。
ENUS: By embedding fullerene into metal to prepare high coercivity permanent magnets and participating in the manufacturing of magnetic levitation turbines, the operational performance of electromagnetic turbines can be easily improved.

Name: 磁胶粒子宽带
ZHCN: 磁胶粒子宽带
ENUS: Magnetic Adhesive Particle Broadband

Name: T磁胶粒子宽带
ZHCN: 从文明遗物中拼凑整理出来的科技，记录了另一种电磁涡轮的制造方法。
ENUS: Magnetic Adhesive Particle Broadband

Name: R磁胶粒子宽带

<color="#FD965ECC">Comes with a 25% production capacity bonus, Can be combined with yield-enhancing agents</color>

Name: 深空货舰
ZHCN: 深空货舰

ENUS: A larger cargo warehouse, a more sturdy hull, and a more powerful propulsion system make up the Deep Space Warplane Cargo Ship. It is a specialized ocean freight ship designed for cross galaxy transportation, equipped with a curvature engine that can travel through distant barren areas between galaxies at a speed far beyond the reach of space transport ships, ensuring the immediacy of the logistics system.

Name: 石墨烯
ZHCN: 石墨烯

Name: T石墨烯
ZHCN: 石墨烯是碳的同素异形体，碳原子以sp²杂化键合形成单层六边形蜂窝晶格石墨烯。石墨烯具有优异的光学、电学、力学特性，在材料学、微纳加工、能源、生物医学和药物传递等方面具有重要的应用前景，被认为是一种革命性的材料。
ENUS: Graphene is an allotrope of carbon, formed by sp² hybridized bonding of carbon atoms into a single-layer hexagonal honeycomb lattice. Graphene exhibits excellent optical, electrical, and mechanical properties, and holds significant application prospects in materials science, micro-nano fabrication, energy, biomedicine, and drug delivery. It is considered a revolutionary material.

ENUS: Chemical vapor deposition method involves introducing hydrogen gas to reduce the catalyst surface, using methane as a carbon source to decompose carbon atoms at high temperatures, and depositing them on the copper foil surface to form a graphene film.

Name: T第三代半导体描述
ZHCN: 经过第一代纯硅，第二代砷化镓的发展，第三代半导体主要以碳化硅为代表的半导体材料。具有更宽的禁带宽度、更高的击穿电场、更高的热导率、更高的电子饱和速率及更高的抗辐射能力，因此更适合于制作高温、高频、大功率及抗辐射器件。
ENUS: After the development of the first generation of pure silicon and the second generation of gallium arsenide, the third generation of semiconductors mainly consists of semiconductor materials represented by silicon carbide. It has a wider bandgap, higher breakdown electric field, higher thermal conductivity, higher electron saturation rate, and higher radiation resistance, making it more suitable for making high-temperature, high-frequency, high-power, and radiation resistant devices.

ENUS: Using strange matter as the core of gravitational knots, hydrogen atoms break through electromagnetic repulsion and are brought closer to the range of strong interaction forces, forming a dense atomic wall. The structure existing in molecular form is as soft as water in front of it.

ZHCN: 尽管COSMO已经不再使用化学燃烧发电，但是为了各位伊卡洛斯在执行戴森球计划中初期电力需求，工程师们还是把火力蒸汽发电轮机从历史中翻了出来，并以如今的水平进行重新设计优化，将能量转化效率提高至80%。
ENUS: Although COSMO no longer uses chemical combustion for power generation, in order to meet the initial electricity needs of Icarus during the execution of the Dyson sphere plan, engineers have turned over the thermal steam turbine from history and redesigned and optimized it at its current level, increasing the energy conversion efficiency to 80%.
